Package de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io.intermediate

Class BuiltInAppIntermediate

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io.intermediate.AppIntermediate
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io.intermediate.BuiltInAppIntermediate
Direct Known Subclasses:
MergeAppIntermediate, MergePartnerAppIntermediate, SMTAppIntermediate
public class BuiltInAppIntermediate extends AppIntermediate
Encapsulates intermediate information for constructing a built-in rule application.
